title: iterate

messages.description: outputs the last received input as sequential elements
sets direction >= 0 is left to right, < 0 is reverse
according to the input element, in sequential order

arguments.description: direction, >= 0 is left to right, < 0 is reverse

flags.name: -trim
flags.description: trims symbol selector on the output

body: [iterate] splits a message to individual elements (floats/symbols) and outputs them sequentially.
